\begin{circuitikz}
    
    % Place logic gates
    \draw (0,0)             node[nand port, number inputs=2](nand1){}
    ([yshift=-2cm] nand1)   node[nand port, number inputs=2](nand2){}
    (nand1.in 1)            node[and port, number inputs=2, anchor=out](and5){}
    (nand2.in 2)            node[and port, number inputs=2, anchor=out](and6){}
    (and5.in 2)            node[nand port, number inputs=2, anchor=out](nand3){}
    (and6.in 1)            node[nand port, number inputs=2, anchor=out](nand4){}

    ([xshift=-1cm] $(nand3.in 2)! 0.5!(nand4.in 1)$)
                            node[not port, rotate=-90](not1){}

    % Internal connections
    (nand1.in 2)            to[short] ++(0,-0.4)
                            to[short] ([yshift=0.4cm] nand2.in 1 -| nand2.out)
                            to[short] (nand2.out)
    (nand2.in 1)            to[short] ++(0,0.4)
                            to[short] ([yshift=-0.4cm] nand1.in 2 -| nand1.out)
                            to[short] (nand1.out)
    (nand3.in 2)            to[short] (nand4.in 1)
    (nand3.in 1)            to[short] (\tikztostart -| not1.in)
                            to[short] (not1.in)
    (not1.out)              to[short] (\tikztostart |- nand4.in 2)
                            to[short] (nand4.in 2)
    
    % Latch inputs
    (nand3.in 1 -| not1.in) to[short, *-] ++(-0.5,0)
                            node[left](){$D$}
    ($(nand3.in 2)! 0.5!(nand4.in 1)$)
                            to[short, *-] ++(0.5,0)
                            node[right](){$E$}
    (and5.in 1)             to[short] ++(0,0.5)
                            node[above](){\ctikztextnot{PRE}}
    (and6.in 2)             to[short] ++(0,-0.5)
                            node[below](){\ctikztextnot{CLR}}
    
    % Latch outputs
    (nand1.out)             to[short, *-] ++(0.5,0) coordinate(Q)
                            node[right](){$Q$}
    (nand2.out)             to[short, *-] (\tikztostart -| Q)
                            node[right](){$\overline{Q}$}
    ;

\end{circuitikz}
